subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from the servant unto him who hath been guided by the lights of guidance and who hath taken hold of the protection of God, the King [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من العبد الی الذی اهتدی بانوار الهدی و اعتصم بعصمه الله الملک
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @soul; spirit after death, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
